# PHIL.058 ? Utilitarianism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** utilitarianism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Greatest happiness for greatest number; consequentialism; pleasure and pain as metrics; impartial benevolence; hedonic calculus

## Application
Evaluate by consequences; maximize overall happiness; impartial consideration; quantify pleasure/pain where possible; aggregate welfare

## Key Values
- Utility maximization
- Consequentialism
- Impartiality
- Happiness

## Tags
philosophy, modern-western, utilitarianism
